der_note: RMSEWithUncertainty der (error_functions.h:280-313): diff=target-approx[0]; prec=exp(-2*approx[1]); der1=[w*diff, w*(diff*diff*prec-1)]; der2-diag=[-w, -2*w*diff*diff*prec].
leaf_method_note: RMSEWithUncertainty=Newton/1-iter (DIAGONAL hessian: each dim is an INDEPENDENT scalar Newton step der2[0]=-w, der2[1]=-2*w*diff^2*prec; NOT the MultiClass dense symmetric solve, 06.4-RESEARCH Pitfall 4).
leaf_values_layout: model.json leaf_values are LEAF-MAJOR (leaf0_d0, leaf0_d1, leaf1_d0, ...) length leaves*2; leaf_weights length leaves.
predictions_layout: predict(RawFormulaVal): (n_rows, 2) OBJECT-MAJOR row-major (RAW 2-dim [mean, log-scale] approx, identity — NO variance transform), flat f64.
staged_layout: staged_predict(RawFormulaVal): per-iter (n_rows, 2) OBJECT-MAJOR (row-major object then dim: [mean, log-scale]), concatenated across iterations; flat f64.
